title: Heat resistant composite material structure
abstract: A composite material structure (10) is described that comprises an element (12) of a ceramic based composite material secured to an element (14) of a resin based composite material, the ceramic based composite material element (12) serving as a heat shield, shielding the resin based composite material element (14) from heat produced, in use, from a heat source.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A composite material structure comprising an element of a ceramic based composite material secured to an element of a resin based composite material, the ceramic based composite material element serving as a heat shield, shielding the resin based composite material element from heat produced, in use, from a heat source. 2. A structure according to Claim 1, wherein the ceramic based composite element is arranged to shield the connections between the composite material elements from the heat produced, in use, from the heat source. 3. A structure according to Claim 2, wherein the ceramic based composite material element is shaped to hold the resin based composite material element captive thereto. 4. A structure according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the ceramic based composite material element includes fingers shaped to extend behind the resin based composite material element to hold the resin based composite material element to the ceramic based composited material element. 5. A structure according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the composite material elements are adapted to, together, house a heat absorbing core. 6. A structure according to Claim 5, wherein the core serves to provide thermal protection for points at which the composite material elements are secured to one another. 7. A structure according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the resin based composite material element has mounting fittings or the like secured thereto. 8. A structure according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the ceramic based composite material element provides heat shielding to the entirety of the resin based composite material element. 9. A structure according to any of Claims 1 to 7, wherein the ceramic based composite material element provides heat shielding to only part of the resin based composite material element. 10. A structure according to any of the preceding claims, further comprising a layer of a material to enhance the thermal properties of the structure. 11. A structure according to Claim 10, wherein the layer comprises a coating or a layer laminated to at least part of the structure.
